7:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Threat Model"}]
8:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Threat"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mitigation"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Data theft (local)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Filesystem permissions on SQLite DB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Data theft (network)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No network exposure by default"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Prompt injection"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Input validation, parameterized queries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory poisoning"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Importance scoring, scope isolation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Data loss"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Backup and recovery via disaster recovery module"}]]}]]}]]}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Security Features"}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local-first"}],": All data stays in a local SQLite database by default"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local embeddings"}],": Uses BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 via fastembed (384 dims) — no external API calls"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"No cloud required"}],": All data stays local by default"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Input sanitization"}],": All user inputs are parameterized"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session isolation"}],": Separate session IDs isolate memory contexts"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Disaster recovery"}],": Backup and restore via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.dr.recovery"}]]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Embedding Model"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]," library for all embedding generation. This runs entirely locally — no text is ever sent to an external API."]}]
d:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L15",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No External API Calls"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"By default, Mnemosyne does not send any data to external services. All embedding generation happens locally via fastembed. No OpenAI or other cloud embedding APIs are used."}]}]]}]]}]}]
